Tool Call #307 shell_command call_0WCy8kkqPzrfkW6Nc5KoN3o7 03:56:45
shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'\n$org = 'papaweb-org'\n$rows = Import-Csv -Path \"docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv\" -Delimiter \"`t\"\n$repos = New-Object System...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'\n$org = 'papaweb-org'\n$rows = Import-Csv -Path \"docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv\" -Delimiter \"`t\"\n$repos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)\nforeach ($r in $rows) {\n  $url = [string]$r.repo\n  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($url)) { continue }\n  $parts = $url.Trim().TrimEnd('/').Split('/')\n  $name = $parts[$parts.Length - 1]\n  if ($name.EndsWith('.git', [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {\n    $name = $name.Substring(0, $name.Length - 4)\n  }\n  [void]$repos.Add($name)\n}\n\n$check = @()\nforeach ($repo in $repos) {\n  $full = \"$org/$repo\"\n  $branch = (& gh api \"repos/$full\" -q .default_branch).Trim()\n\n  $actions = (& gh api \"repos/$full/actions/permissions\") | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $workflow = (& gh api \"repos/$full/actions/permissions/workflow\") | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $protect = (& gh api \"repos/$full/branches/$branch/protection\") | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n  $check += [pscustomobject]@{\n    repo = $full\n    branch = $branch\n    actions_ok = ($actions.enabled -eq $true -and $actions.allowed_actions -eq 'local_only')\n    workflow_ok = ($workflow.default_workflow_permissions -eq 'read' -and $workflow.can_approve_pull_request_reviews -eq $false)\n    protection_ok = ($protect.required_pull_request_reviews.required_approving_review_count -eq 1 -and $protect.allow_force_pushes.enabled -eq $false -and $protect.allow_deletions.enabled -eq $false)\n  }\n}\n\n[pscustomobject]@{\n  total = $check.Count\n  all_actions_ok = ($check | Where-Object { -not $_.actions_ok }).Count -eq 0\n  all_workflow_ok = ($check | Where-Object { -not $_.workflow_ok }).Count -eq 0\n  all_protection_ok = ($check | Where-Object { -not $_.protection_ok }).Count -eq 0\n  failed = ($check | Where-Object { -not $_.actions_ok -or -not $_.workflow_ok -or -not $_.protection_ok })\n} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5",
  "timeout_ms": 600000
}

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: 1:param( 2: [string]$Org = "papaweb-org", 3: [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-寮€婧愪粨搴撲笅杞戒笌钀戒綅娓呭崟.tsv", 4: [switch]$DryRu...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0

Output:
1:param(
2:  [string]$Org = "papaweb-org",
3:  [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-寮€婧愪粨搴撲笅杞戒笌钀戒綅娓呭崟.tsv",
4:  [switch]$DryRun
5:)
6:
7:$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
8:
9:function Write-Log {
10:  param(
11:    [string]$Level,
12:    [string]$Message
13:  )
14:  $ts = (Get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
15:  Write-Host "[$ts][$Level] $Message"
16:}
17:
18:function Get-RepoNameFromUrl {
19:  param([string]$Url)
20:
21:  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($Url)) {
22:    return ""
23:  }
24:
25:  $clean = $Url.Trim().TrimEnd("/")
26:  if ($clean.EndsWith(".git", [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
27:    $clean = $clean.Substring(0, $clean.Length - 4)
28:  }
29:
30:  $parts = $clean.Split("/")
31:  if ($parts.Length -lt 2) {
32:    return ""
33:  }
34:  return $parts[$parts.Length - 1]
35:}
36:
37:function Invoke-GhApi {
38:  param(
39:    [string[]]$ApiArgs,
40:    [string]$InputJson = ""
41:  )
42:
43:  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($InputJson)) {
44:    & gh api @ApiArgs
45:  } else {
46:    $InputJson | & gh api @ApiArgs --input -
47:  }
48:
49:  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
50:    throw "gh api failed: gh api $($ApiArgs -join ' ')"
51:  }
52:}
53:
54:if (-not (Test-Path $ManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
55:  throw "Manifest not found: $ManifestPath"
56:}
57:
58:$rows = Import-Csv -Path $ManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
59:if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
60:  throw "Manifest is empty: $ManifestPath"
61:}
62:
63:$repos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
64:foreach ($row in $rows) {
65:  $repoName = Get-RepoNameFromUrl -Url ([string]$row.repo)
66:  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoName)) {
67:    [void]$repos.Add($repoName)
68:  }
69:}
70:
71:if ($repos.Count -eq 0) {
72:  throw "No repositories resolved from manifest."
73:}
74:
75:$branchProtectionJson = '{"required_status_checks":null,"enforce_admins":false,"required_pull_request_reviews":{"dismiss_stale_reviews":true,"require_code_owner_reviews":false,"required_approving_review_count":1},"restrictions":null,"required_linear_history":true,"allow_force_pushes":false,"allow_deletions":false,"block_creations":false,"required_conversation_resolution":true,"lock_branch":false,"allow_fork_syncing":true}'
76:$summary = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
77:
78:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
79:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $ManifestPath"
80:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Repos: $($repos.Count)"
81:
82:foreach ($repo in $repos) {
83:  $fullRepo = "$Org/$repo"
84:  $defaultBranch = ""
85:
86:  try {
87:    $defaultBranch = (& gh api "repos/$fullRepo" -q .default_branch).Trim()
88:    if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($defaultBranch)) {
89:      throw "cannot read default branch"
90:    }
91:
92:    if ($DryRun) {
93:      Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] dry-run branch=$defaultBranch"
94:      $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
95:          repo = $fullRepo
96:          branch = $defaultBranch
97:          status = "dry_run"
98:          detail = "planned"
99:        })
100:      continue
101:    }
102:
103:    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying actions permissions"
104:    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
105:      "-X", "PUT",
106:      "repos/$fullRepo/actions/permissions",
107:      "-F", "enabled=true",
108:      "-F", "allowed_actions=local_only"
109:    )
110:
111:    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying workflow token permissions"
112:    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
113:      "-X", "PUT",
114:      "repos/$fullRepo/actions/permissions/workflow",
115:      "-F", "default_workflow_permissions=read",
116:      "-F", "can_approve_pull_request_reviews=false"
117:    )
118:
119:    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying branch protection on $defaultBranch"
120:    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
121:      "-X", "PUT",
122:      "repos/$fullRepo/branches/$defaultBranch/protection"
123:    ) -InputJson $branchProtectionJson
124:
125:    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
126:        repo = $fullRepo
127:        branch = $defaultBranch
128:        status = "ok"
129:        detail = "policies applied"
130:      })
131:  } catch {
132:    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
133:        repo = $fullRepo
134:        branch = $defaultBranch
135:        status = "failed"
136:        detail = $_.Exception.Message
137:      })
138:  }
139:}
140:
141:Write-Host ""
142:Write-Host "Summary:"
143:$summary | Format-Table -AutoSize
144:
145:$failed = @($summary | Where-Object { $_.status -eq "failed" })
146:if ($failed.Count -gt 0) {
147:  throw "Completed with errors: $($failed.Count)"
148:}
149:
150:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Completed successfully."

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: 1:param( 2: [string]$Org = "papaweb-org", 3: [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-寮€婧愪粨搴撲笅杞戒笌钀戒綅娓呭崟.tsv", 4: [string[]]$Com...

Exit code: 0

Output:
1:param(
2:  [string]$Org = "papaweb-org",
3:  [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-寮€婧愪粨搴撲笅杞戒笌钀戒綅娓呭崟.tsv",
4:  [string[]]$Components = @(),
5:  [string[]]$Statuses = @("ready"),
6:  [int]$Limit = 0,
7:  [switch]$Force,
8:  [switch]$DryRun
9:)
10:
11:$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
12:
13:function Write-Log {
14:  param(
15:    [string]$Level,
16:    [string]$Message
17:  )
18:  $ts = (Get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
19:  Write-Host "[$ts][$Level] $Message"
20:}
21:
22:function Get-RepoNameFromUrl {
23:  param([string]$Url)
24:
25:  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($Url)) {
26:    return ""
27:  }
28:
29:  $clean = $Url.Trim().TrimEnd("/")
30:  if ($clean.EndsWith(".git", [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
31:    $clean = $clean.Substring(0, $clean.Length - 4)
32:  }
33:
34:  $parts = $clean.Split("/")
35:  if ($parts.Length -lt 2) {
36:    return ""
37:  }
38:  return $parts[$parts.Length - 1]
39:}
40:
41:function Get-RowValue {
42:  param(
43:    [pscustomobject]$Row,
44:    [string[]]$CandidateKeys
45:  )
46:
47:  foreach ($key in $CandidateKeys) {
48:    if ($Row.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $key) {
49:      $value = [string]$Row.$key
50:      if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($value)) {
51:        return $value.Trim()
52:      }
53:    }
54:  }
55:  return ""
56:}
57:
58:function Invoke-Gh {
59:  param([string[]]$GhArgs)
60:
61:  & gh @GhArgs
62:  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
63:    throw "gh command failed: gh $($GhArgs -join ' ')"
64:  }
65:}
66:
67:if (-not (Test-Path $ManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
68:  throw "Manifest not found: $ManifestPath"
69:}
70:
71:$rows = Import-Csv -Path $ManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
72:if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
73:  throw "Manifest is empty: $ManifestPath"
74:}
75:
76:$statusSet = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
77:foreach ($status in $Statuses) {
78:  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($status)) {
79:    [void]$statusSet.Add($status.Trim())
80:  }
81:}
82:
83:$componentSet = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
84:foreach ($component in $Components) {
85:  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($component)) {
86:    [void]$componentSet.Add($component.Trim())
87:  }
88:}
89:
90:$filtered = @()
91:foreach ($row in $rows) {
92:  $component = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("component")
93:  $status = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("status")
94:
95:  if ($statusSet.Count -gt 0 -and -not $statusSet.Contains($status)) {
96:    continue
97:  }
98:  if ($componentSet.Count -gt 0 -and -not $componentSet.Contains($component)) {
99:    continue
100:  }
101:  $filtered += $row
102:}
103:$filtered = @($filtered)
104:
105:if ($Limit -gt 0 -and $filtered.Count -gt $Limit) {
106:  $filtered = @($filtered | Select-Object -First $Limit)
107:}
108:
109:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
110:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $ManifestPath"
111:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Rows selected: $($filtered.Count)"
112:
113:$summary = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
114:$seenRepos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
115:
116:foreach ($row in $filtered) {
117:  $component = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("component")
118:  $repoUrl = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("repo")
119:  $repoName = Get-RepoNameFromUrl -Url $repoUrl
120:
121:  try {
122:    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoName)) {
123:      throw "cannot parse repo name from URL: $repoUrl"
124:    }
125:    if (-not $seenRepos.Add($repoName)) {
126:      continue
127:    }
128:
129:    $fullRepo = "$Org/$repoName"
130:    $repoJson = (& gh api "repos/$fullRepo")
131:    if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoJson)) {
132:      throw "cannot read repository metadata"
133:    }
134:
135:    $repoObj = $repoJson | ConvertFrom-Json
136:    $defaultBranch = [string]$repoObj.default_branch
137:    $parentFullName = ""
138:    if ($null -ne $repoObj.parent) {
139:      $parentFullName = [string]$repoObj.parent.full_name
140:    }
141:
142:    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($defaultBranch)) {
143:      throw "default branch is empty"
144:    }
145:    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($parentFullName)) {
146:      throw "repo is not a fork or parent cannot be resolved"
147:    }
148:
149:    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] parent=$parentFullName branch=$defaultBranch"
150:
151:    if ($DryRun) {
152:      $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
153:          component = $component
154:          repo = $fullRepo
155:          branch = $defaultBranch
156:          result = "dry_run"
157:        })
158:      continue
159:    }
160:
161:    $syncArgs = @("repo", "sync", $fullRepo, "-b", $defaultBranch)
162:    if ($Force) {
163:      $syncArgs += "--force"
164:    }
165:    Invoke-Gh -GhArgs $syncArgs
166:
167:    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
168:        component = $component
169:        repo = $fullRepo
170:        branch = $defaultBranch
171:        result = "ok"
172:      })
173:  } catch {
174:    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
175:        component = $component
176:        repo = "$Org/$repoName"
177:        branch = ""
178:        result = "error: $($_.Exception.Message)"
179:      })
180:  }
181:}
182:
183:Write-Host ""
184:Write-Host "Summary:"
185:$summary | Format-Table -AutoSize
186:
187:$errors = @($summary | Where-Object { $_.result -like "error:*" })
188:if ($errors.Count -gt 0) {
189:  throw "Completed with errors: $($errors.Count)"
190:}
191:
192:Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Completed successfully."

assistant #328 commentary 03:58:55

我发现两个新脚本里默认 ManifestPath 的中文文件名被终端编码污染了；我会改成“自动发现 manifest”，避免后续在任何环境都稳。

Tool Call #329 apply_patch call_KaGAXkEU4JNONZUn3ZNV3ixA 03:59:05
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1 @@ param( [string]$Org = "papaweb-org", - [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv", ...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1
@@
 param(
   [string]$Org = "papaweb-org",
-  [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv",
+  [string]$ManifestPath = "",
   [switch]$DryRun
 )
@@
 function Get-RepoNameFromUrl {
@@
 }
 
+function Resolve-ManifestPath {
+  param([string]$PathInput)
+
+  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
+    return $PathInput
+  }
+
+  $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
+  if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
+    throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
+  }
+
+  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
+  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
+    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
+  }
+  return $candidate.FullName
+}
+
 function Invoke-GhApi {
@@
-if (-not (Test-Path $ManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
-  throw "Manifest not found: $ManifestPath"
+$resolvedManifestPath = Resolve-ManifestPath -PathInput $ManifestPath
+
+if (-not (Test-Path $resolvedManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
+  throw "Manifest not found: $resolvedManifestPath"
 }
 
-$rows = Import-Csv -Path $ManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
+$rows = Import-Csv -Path $resolvedManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
 if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
-  throw "Manifest is empty: $ManifestPath"
+  throw "Manifest is empty: $resolvedManifestPath"
 }
@@
 Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
-Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $ManifestPath"
+Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
*** End Patch

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1 @@ param( [string]$Org = "papaweb-org", - [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单....
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1
@@
 param(
   [string]$Org = "papaweb-org",
-  [string]$ManifestPath = "docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv",
+  [string]$ManifestPath = "",
   [string[]]$Components = @(),
   [string[]]$Statuses = @("ready"),
   [int]$Limit = 0,
@@
 function Get-RowValue {
@@
 }
 
+function Resolve-ManifestPath {
+  param([string]$PathInput)
+
+  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
+    return $PathInput
+  }
+
+  $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
+  if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
+    throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
+  }
+
+  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
+  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
+    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
+  }
+  return $candidate.FullName
+}
+
 function Invoke-Gh {
@@
-if (-not (Test-Path $ManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
-  throw "Manifest not found: $ManifestPath"
+$resolvedManifestPath = Resolve-ManifestPath -PathInput $ManifestPath
+
+if (-not (Test-Path $resolvedManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
+  throw "Manifest not found: $resolvedManifestPath"
 }
 
-$rows = Import-Csv -Path $ManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
+$rows = Import-Csv -Path $resolvedManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
 if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
-  throw "Manifest is empty: $ManifestPath"
+  throw "Manifest is empty: $resolvedManifestPath"
 }
@@
 Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
-Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $ManifestPath"
+Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
*** End Patch

1/2/3 已执行完成。

已完成
1. 清单 repo 列已全部改为 papaweb-org
[PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv](d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-%E5%BC%80%E6%BA%90%E4%BB%93%E5%BA%93%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%B8%8E%E8%90%BD%E4%BD%8D%E6%B8%85%E5%8D%95.tsv#L1)

2. papaweb-org 的 21 个 fork 已批量应用策略（已验收通过）
- Branch protection：默认分支要求 1 个审批、禁 force push、禁删除分支、要求会话已解决
- Actions：enabled=true + allowed_actions=local_only
- Workflow token：default_workflow_permissions=read，PR 审批关闭
校验结果：21/21 全通过（actions/workflow/protection 全为 true）

3. 已生成一键脚本（可复用）
- 策略脚本：[apply-org-policies.ps1](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1#L1)
- Upstream 同步脚本：[sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1#L1)
并已做验证：
- 全量 -DryRun 成功
- Airflow 实际同步成功（非 dry-run）

4. 已新增 CODEOWNERS（当前主仓）
[CODEOWNERS](d:/demo1/papaweb/.github/CODEOWNERS#L1)

当前本地改动文件
- [PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv](d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-%E5%BC%80%E6%BA%90%E4%BB%93%E5%BA%93%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%B8%8E%E8%90%BD%E4%BD%8D%E6%B8%85%E5%8D%95.tsv)

If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

assistant #379 final_answer 04:09:15

它们就是 GitHub 上两层“防误操作/防越权”机制。

1. 默认分支保护（Branch Protection）
- 作用：保护 main/master/trunk 这类主分支，避免直接把坏代码推上去。
- 你这次设置的是：
- 必须走 PR，且至少 1 个审批
- 新提交后旧审批失效（dismiss_stale_reviews=true）
- 讨论未解决不能合并（required_conversation_resolution=true）
- 禁止强推（force push）和删除分支
- 要求线性历史（required_linear_history=true）
- 管理员仍可绕过（enforce_admins=false）

2. Actions 权限（GitHub Actions Permissions）
- 作用：限制 CI/CD 能运行什么、拿到多大权限。
- 你这次设置的是：
- enabled=true（启用 Actions）
- allowed_actions=local_only（只允许本仓库内的 actions/workflow，第三方 marketplace action 不允许）
- default_workflow_permissions=read（GITHUB_TOKEN 默认只读）
- can_approve_pull_request_reviews=false（workflow 不能代替人去审批 PR）

一句话：
默认分支保护是“保护主干不被乱改”，Actions 权限是“限制自动化脚本的能力范围”。

Show task summary

它们就是 GitHub 上两层“防误操作/防越权”机制。

1. 默认分支保护（Branch Protection）
- 作用：保护 main/master/trunk 这类主分支，避免直接把坏代码推上去。
- 你这次设置的是：
- 必须走 PR，且至少 1 个审批
- 新提交后旧审批失效（dismiss_stale_reviews=true）
- 讨论未解决不能合并（required_conversation_resolution=true）
- 禁止强推（force push）和删除分支
- 要求线性历史（required_linear_history=true）
- 管理员仍可绕过（enforce_admins=false）

2. Actions 权限（GitHub Actions Permissions）
- 作用：限制 CI/CD 能运行什么、拿到多大权限。
- 你这次设置的是：
- enabled=true（启用 Actions）
- allowed_actions=local_only（只允许本仓库内的 actions/workflow，第三方 marketplace action 不允许）
- default_workflow_permissions=read（GITHUB_TOKEN 默认只读）
- can_approve_pull_request_reviews=false（workflow 不能代替人去审批 PR）

一句话：
默认分支保护是“保护主干不被乱改”，Actions 权限是“限制自动化脚本的能力范围”。

Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }

Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

## My request for Codex:
我可以下一步把这个仓库远端切到 papaweb-org/papaweb 并推一次 这是什么意思 我们前面的推送 不是这个仓库吗 还是原来的仓库吗

assistant #428 final_answer 04:20:10

你理解得对，前面推送的是原来的个人仓库，不是组织仓库。

从我刚才执行结果看，当前 origin 是：

git@github.com:beyondchenlin/papaweb.git

所以你前面的提交已经进了 beyondchenlin/papaweb。

我说“切到 papaweb-org/papaweb”的意思是：

1. 把本地 origin 地址改成组织仓库地址
2. 再推一次 main，以后默认都推到组织下

如果你要现在切，命令就是：

git remote set-url origin git@github.com:papaweb-org/papaweb.git
git remote -v
git push origin main

如果 papaweb-org/papaweb 还没创建（或还没从个人仓库转移过去），先做创建/转移再切。

你理解得对，前面推送的是原来的个人仓库，不是组织仓库。

从我刚才执行结果看，当前 origin 是：

git@github.com:beyondchenlin/papaweb.git

所以你前面的提交已经进了 beyondchenlin/papaweb。

我说“切到 papaweb-org/papaweb”的意思是：

1. 把本地 origin 地址改成组织仓库地址
2. 再推一次 main，以后默认都推到组织下

如果你要现在切，命令就是：

git remote set-url origin git@github.com:papaweb-org/papaweb.git
git remote -v
git push origin main

如果 papaweb-org/papaweb 还没创建（或还没从个人仓库转移过去），先做创建/转移再切。

assistant #538 final_answer 04:33:03

继续完成了，当前状态如下：

- 主仓已在组织下：papaweb-org/papaweb
- 本地远端已切换到组织仓库（之前已完成）：origin = git@github.com:papaweb-org/papaweb.git
- 我刚把主仓 Actions 权限收紧为：
- enabled: true
- allowed_actions: local_only
- Workflow token 权限已是：
- default_workflow_permissions: read
- can_approve_pull_request_reviews: false

唯一没法直接做的是主仓分支保护：
- GitHub API 返回 403，提示当前套餐下私有仓不支持该功能（需要 GitHub Pro/Team，或把仓库改为公开）。

如果你要，我下一步可以继续：
1. 把 papaweb-org/papaweb 临时改公开并立即加上分支保护，再按你需要决定是否改回私有。
2. 保持私有不变，我给你落地一套“无分支保护时的替代流程”（强制 PR + CODEOWNERS + CI 必过）。

继续完成了，当前状态如下：

- 主仓已在组织下：papaweb-org/papaweb
- 本地远端已切换到组织仓库（之前已完成）：origin = git@github.com:papaweb-org/papaweb.git
- 我刚把主仓 Actions 权限收紧为：
- enabled: true
- allowed_actions: local_only
- Workflow token 权限已是：
- default_workflow_permissions: read
- can_approve_pull_request_reviews: false

唯一没法直接做的是主仓分支保护：
- GitHub API 返回 403，提示当前套餐下私有仓不支持该功能（需要 GitHub Pro/Team，或把仓库改为公开）。

如果你要，我下一步可以继续：
1. 把 papaweb-org/papaweb 临时改公开并立即加上分支保护，再按你需要决定是否改回私有。
2. 保持私有不变，我给你落地一套“无分支保护时的替代流程”（强制 PR + CODEOWNERS + CI 必过）。

1	param(
2	  [string]$Org = "papaweb-org",
3	  [string]$ManifestPath = "",
4	  [switch]$DryRun
5	)
6	
7	$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
8	
9	function Write-Log {
10	  param(
11	    [string]$Level,
12	    [string]$Message
13	  )
14	  $ts = (Get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
15	  Write-Host "[$ts][$Level] $Message"
16	}
17	
18	function Get-RepoNameFromUrl {
19	  param([string]$Url)
20	
21	  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($Url)) {
22	    return ""
23	  }
24	
25	  $clean = $Url.Trim().TrimEnd("/")
26	  if ($clean.EndsWith(".git", [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
27	    $clean = $clean.Substring(0, $clean.Length - 4)
28	  }
29	
30	  $parts = $clean.Split("/")
31	  if ($parts.Length -lt 2) {
32	    return ""
33	  }
34	  return $parts[$parts.Length - 1]
35	}
36	
37	function Resolve-ManifestPath {
38	  param([string]$PathInput)
39	
40	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
41	    return $PathInput
42	  }
43	
44	  $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
45	  if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
46	    throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
47	  }
48	
49	  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
50	  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
51	    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
52	  }
53	  return $candidate.FullName
54	}
55	
56	function Invoke-GhApi {
57	  param(
58	    [string[]]$ApiArgs,
59	    [string]$InputJson = ""
60	  )
61	
62	  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($InputJson)) {
63	    & gh api @ApiArgs | Out-Null
64	  } else {
65	    $InputJson | & gh api @ApiArgs --input - | Out-Null
66	  }
67	
68	  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
69	    throw "gh api failed: gh api $($ApiArgs -join ' ')"
70	  }
71	}
72	
73	$resolvedManifestPath = Resolve-ManifestPath -PathInput $ManifestPath
74	
75	if (-not (Test-Path $resolvedManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
76	  throw "Manifest not found: $resolvedManifestPath"
77	}
78	
79	$rows = Import-Csv -Path $resolvedManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
80	if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
81	  throw "Manifest is empty: $resolvedManifestPath"
82	}
83	
84	$repos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
85	foreach ($row in $rows) {
86	  $repoName = Get-RepoNameFromUrl -Url ([string]$row.repo)
87	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoName)) {
88	    [void]$repos.Add($repoName)
89	  }
90	}
91	
92	if ($repos.Count -eq 0) {
93	  throw "No repositories resolved from manifest."
94	}
95	
96	$branchProtectionJson = '{"required_status_checks":null,"enforce_admins":false,"required_pull_request_reviews":{"dismiss_stale_reviews":true,"require_code_owner_reviews":false,"required_approving_review_count":1},"restrictions":null,"required_linear_history":true,"allow_force_pushes":false,"allow_deletions":false,"block_creations":false,"required_conversation_resolution":true,"lock_branch":false,"allow_fork_syncing":true}'
97	$summary = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
98	
99	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
100	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
101	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Repos: $($repos.Count)"
102	
103	foreach ($repo in $repos) {
104	  $fullRepo = "$Org/$repo"
105	  $defaultBranch = ""
106	
107	  try {
108	    $defaultBranch = (& gh api "repos/$fullRepo" -q .default_branch).Trim()
109	    if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($defaultBranch)) {
110	      throw "cannot read default branch"
111	    }
112	
113	    if ($DryRun) {
114	      Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] dry-run branch=$defaultBranch"
115	      $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
116	          repo = $fullRepo
117	          branch = $defaultBranch
118	          status = "dry_run"
119	          detail = "planned"
120	        })
121	      continue
122	    }
123	
124	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying actions permissions"
125	    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
126	      "-X", "PUT",
127	      "repos/$fullRepo/actions/permissions",
128	      "-F", "enabled=true",
129	      "-F", "allowed_actions=local_only"
130	    )
131	
132	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying workflow token permissions"
133	    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
134	      "-X", "PUT",
135	      "repos/$fullRepo/actions/permissions/workflow",
136	      "-F", "default_workflow_permissions=read",
137	      "-F", "can_approve_pull_request_reviews=false"
138	    )
139	
140	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying branch protection on $defaultBranch"
141	    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
142	      "-X", "PUT",
143	      "repos/$fullRepo/branches/$defaultBranch/protection"
144	    ) -InputJson $branchProtectionJson
145	
146	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
147	        repo = $fullRepo
148	        branch = $defaultBranch
149	        status = "ok"
150	        detail = "policies applied"
151	      })
152	  } catch {
153	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
154	        repo = $fullRepo
155	        branch = $defaultBranch
156	        status = "failed"
157	        detail = $_.Exception.Message
158	      })
159	  }
160	}
161	
162	Write-Host ""
163	Write-Host "Summary:"
164	$summary | Format-Table -AutoSize
165	
166	$failed = @($summary | Where-Object { $_.status -eq "failed" })
167	if ($failed.Count -gt 0) {
168	  throw "Completed with errors: $($failed.Count)"
169	}
170	
171	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Completed successfully."

41	function Get-RowValue {
42	  param(
43	    [pscustomobject]$Row,
44	    [string[]]$CandidateKeys
45	  )
46	
47	  foreach ($key in $CandidateKeys) {
48	    if ($Row.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $key) {
49	      $value = [string]$Row.$key
50	      if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($value)) {
51	        return $value.Trim()
52	      }
53	    }
54	  }
55	  return ""
56	}
57	
58	function Resolve-ManifestPath {
59	  param([string]$PathInput)
60	
61	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
62	    return $PathInput
63	  }
64	
65	  $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
66	  if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
67	    throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
68	  }
69	
70	  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
71	  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
72	    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
73	  }
74	  return $candidate.FullName
75	}
76	
77	function Invoke-Gh {
78	  param([string[]]$GhArgs)
79	
80	  & gh @GhArgs
81	  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
82	    throw "gh command failed: gh $($GhArgs -join ' ')"
83	  }
84	}
85	
86	$resolvedManifestPath = Resolve-ManifestPath -PathInput $ManifestPath
87	
88	if (-not (Test-Path $resolvedManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
89	  throw "Manifest not found: $resolvedManifestPath"
90	}
91	
92	$rows = Import-Csv -Path $resolvedManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
93	if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
94	  throw "Manifest is empty: $resolvedManifestPath"
95	}
96	
97	$statusSet = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
98	foreach ($status in $Statuses) {
99	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($status)) {
100	    [void]$statusSet.Add($status.Trim())
101	  }
102	}
103	
104	$componentSet = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
105	foreach ($component in $Components) {
106	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($component)) {
107	    [void]$componentSet.Add($component.Trim())
108	  }
109	}
110	
111	$filtered = @()
112	foreach ($row in $rows) {
113	  $component = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("component")
114	  $status = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("status")
115	
116	  if ($statusSet.Count -gt 0 -and -not $statusSet.Contains($status)) {
117	    continue
118	  }
119	  if ($componentSet.Count -gt 0 -and -not $componentSet.Contains($component)) {
120	    continue
121	  }
122	  $filtered += $row
123	}
124	$filtered = @($filtered)
125	
126	if ($Limit -gt 0 -and $filtered.Count -gt $Limit) {
127	  $filtered = @($filtered | Select-Object -First $Limit)
128	}
129	
130	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
131	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
132	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Rows selected: $($filtered.Count)"
133	
134	$summary = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
135	$seenRepos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
136	
137	foreach ($row in $filtered) {
138	  $component = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("component")
139	  $repoUrl = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("repo")
140	  $repoName = Get-RepoNameFromUrl -Url $repoUrl
141	
142	  try {
143	    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoName)) {
144	      throw "cannot parse repo name from URL: $repoUrl"
145	    }
146	    if (-not $seenRepos.Add($repoName)) {
147	      continue
148	    }
149	
150	    $fullRepo = "$Org/$repoName"
151	    $repoJson = (& gh api "repos/$fullRepo")
152	    if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoJson)) {
153	      throw "cannot read repository metadata"
154	    }
155	
156	    $repoObj = $repoJson | ConvertFrom-Json
157	    $defaultBranch = [string]$repoObj.default_branch
158	    $parentFullName = ""
159	    if ($null -ne $repoObj.parent) {
160	      $parentFullName = [string]$repoObj.parent.full_name
161	    }
162	
163	    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($defaultBranch)) {
164	      throw "default branch is empty"
165	    }
166	    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($parentFullName)) {
167	      throw "repo is not a fork or parent cannot be resolved"
168	    }
169	
170	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] parent=$parentFullName branch=$defaultBranch"
171	
172	    if ($DryRun) {
173	      $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
174	          component = $component
175	          repo = $fullRepo
176	          branch = $defaultBranch
177	          result = "dry_run"
178	        })
179	      continue
180	    }
181	
182	    $syncArgs = @("repo", "sync", $fullRepo, "-b", $defaultBranch)
183	    if ($Force) {
184	      $syncArgs += "--force"
185	    }
186	    Invoke-Gh -GhArgs $syncArgs
187	
188	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
189	        component = $component
190	        repo = $fullRepo
191	        branch = $defaultBranch
192	        result = "ok"
193	      })
194	  } catch {
195	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
196	        component = $component
197	        repo = "$Org/$repoName"
198	        branch = ""
199	        result = "error: $($_.Exception.Message)"
200	      })
201	  }
202	}
203	
204	Write-Host ""
205	Write-Host "Summary:"
206	$summary | Format-Table -AutoSize
207	
208	$errors = @($summary | Where-Object { $_.result -like "error:*" })
209	if ($errors.Count -gt 0) {
210	  throw "Completed with errors: $($errors.Count)"
211	}
212	
213	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Completed successfully."

assistant #571 final_answer 04:35:16

Findings（第2轮）

1. Medium 自动发现 manifest 的策略过于宽松，可能选错 TSV
在两个脚本里都用了“取 docs/plan/plan0 下按文件名排序第一个 *.tsv”的逻辑，没有校验表头结构是否匹配目标清单。后续只要目录里再放一个更靠前命名的 TSV，就可能跑到错误数据。
- [apply-org-policies.ps1:49](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1#L49)
- [sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1:70](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1#L70)

2. Medium 同步脚本在“选中 0 行”时仍返回成功，容易掩盖配置错误
sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1 过滤后如果是空集，会直接输出成功，不会报错。这在 manifest 选错、status 不匹配、列名不对时会出现“假成功”。
- [sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1:111](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1#L111)
- [sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1:213](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1#L213)

Open Question
- 你希望脚本“必须显式指定 manifest 路径”还是“允许自动发现但要严格校验表头+最少行数”？

次要说明
- 本轮未发现会直接破坏仓库数据的高危问题。
- 目前主要风险是“误选/空跑但显示成功”的可运维性问题。

assistant #581 final_answer 04:43:02

刚刚我们在做这几件事，状态如下：

1. 组织与仓库
- 已把主仓转移到 papaweb-org/papaweb
- 你本地 origin 已切到组织仓库（不再是个人仓库）

2. 代码与推送
- 已提交并推送一版自动化脚本（commit: 5865d32）
- 变更包含：
- docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv（repo 地址改为 papaweb-org）
- .github/CODEOWNERS
- scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1
- scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1

3. GitHub策略
- 21 个 fork 仓库的 Actions + workflow 权限 + 分支保护已批量配置并校验通过
- 主仓 papaweb-org/papaweb 的 Actions 已收紧为 local_only
- 主仓分支保护因 GitHub 套餐限制（私有仓 403）暂时没法开

4. 断线前最后一步
- 我在做“第2轮 review”，发现 2 个中等风险点：
- manifest 自动发现策略可能选错 TSV
- 同步脚本在筛选到 0 行时也会显示成功（可能“空跑假成功”）

如果你同意，我下一步就直接把这两个 review 问题修掉并提交。

Show task summary

刚刚我们在做这几件事，状态如下：

1. 组织与仓库
- 已把主仓转移到 papaweb-org/papaweb
- 你本地 origin 已切到组织仓库（不再是个人仓库）

2. 代码与推送
- 已提交并推送一版自动化脚本（commit: 5865d32）
- 变更包含：
- docs/plan/plan0/PLAN0-开源仓库下载与落位清单.tsv（repo 地址改为 papaweb-org）
- .github/CODEOWNERS
- scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1
- scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1

3. GitHub策略
- 21 个 fork 仓库的 Actions + workflow 权限 + 分支保护已批量配置并校验通过
- 主仓 papaweb-org/papaweb 的 Actions 已收紧为 local_only
- 主仓分支保护因 GitHub 套餐限制（私有仓 403）暂时没法开

4. 断线前最后一步
- 我在做“第2轮 review”，发现 2 个中等风险点：
- manifest 自动发现策略可能选错 TSV
- 同步脚本在筛选到 0 行时也会显示成功（可能“空跑假成功”）

如果你同意，我下一步就直接把这两个 review 问题修掉并提交。

1	param(
2	  [string]$Org = "papaweb-org",
3	  [string]$ManifestPath = "",
4	  [switch]$DryRun
5	)
6	
7	$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
8	
9	function Write-Log {
10	  param(
11	    [string]$Level,
12	    [string]$Message
13	  )
14	  $ts = (Get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
15	  Write-Host "[$ts][$Level] $Message"
16	}
17	
18	function Get-RepoNameFromUrl {
19	  param([string]$Url)
20	
21	  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($Url)) {
22	    return ""
23	  }
24	
25	  $clean = $Url.Trim().TrimEnd("/")
26	  if ($clean.EndsWith(".git", [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
27	    $clean = $clean.Substring(0, $clean.Length - 4)
28	  }
29	
30	  $parts = $clean.Split("/")
31	  if ($parts.Length -lt 2) {
32	    return ""
33	  }
34	  return $parts[$parts.Length - 1]
35	}
36	
37	function Resolve-ManifestPath {
38	  param([string]$PathInput)
39	
40	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
41	    return $PathInput
42	  }
43	
44	  $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
45	  if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
46	    throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
47	  }
48	
49	  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
50	  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
51	    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
52	  }
53	  return $candidate.FullName
54	}
55	
56	function Invoke-GhApi {
57	  param(
58	    [string[]]$ApiArgs,
59	    [string]$InputJson = ""
60	  )
61	
62	  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($InputJson)) {
63	    & gh api @ApiArgs | Out-Null
64	  } else {
65	    $InputJson | & gh api @ApiArgs --input - | Out-Null
66	  }
67	
68	  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
69	    throw "gh api failed: gh api $($ApiArgs -join ' ')"
70	  }
71	}
72	
73	$resolvedManifestPath = Resolve-ManifestPath -PathInput $ManifestPath
74	
75	if (-not (Test-Path $resolvedManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
76	  throw "Manifest not found: $resolvedManifestPath"
77	}
78	
79	$rows = Import-Csv -Path $resolvedManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
80	if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
81	  throw "Manifest is empty: $resolvedManifestPath"
82	}
83	
84	$repos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
85	foreach ($row in $rows) {
86	  $repoName = Get-RepoNameFromUrl -Url ([string]$row.repo)
87	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoName)) {
88	    [void]$repos.Add($repoName)
89	  }
90	}
91	
92	if ($repos.Count -eq 0) {
93	  throw "No repositories resolved from manifest."
94	}
95	
96	$branchProtectionJson = '{"required_status_checks":null,"enforce_admins":false,"required_pull_request_reviews":{"dismiss_stale_reviews":true,"require_code_owner_reviews":false,"required_approving_review_count":1},"restrictions":null,"required_linear_history":true,"allow_force_pushes":false,"allow_deletions":false,"block_creations":false,"required_conversation_resolution":true,"lock_branch":false,"allow_fork_syncing":true}'
97	$summary = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
98	
99	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
100	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
101	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Repos: $($repos.Count)"
102	
103	foreach ($repo in $repos) {
104	  $fullRepo = "$Org/$repo"
105	  $defaultBranch = ""
106	
107	  try {
108	    $defaultBranch = (& gh api "repos/$fullRepo" -q .default_branch).Trim()
109	    if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($defaultBranch)) {
110	      throw "cannot read default branch"
111	    }
112	
113	    if ($DryRun) {
114	      Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] dry-run branch=$defaultBranch"
115	      $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
116	          repo = $fullRepo
117	          branch = $defaultBranch
118	          status = "dry_run"
119	          detail = "planned"
120	        })
121	      continue
122	    }
123	
124	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying actions permissions"
125	    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
126	      "-X", "PUT",
127	      "repos/$fullRepo/actions/permissions",
128	      "-F", "enabled=true",
129	      "-F", "allowed_actions=local_only"
130	    )
131	
132	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying workflow token permissions"
133	    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
134	      "-X", "PUT",
135	      "repos/$fullRepo/actions/permissions/workflow",
136	      "-F", "default_workflow_permissions=read",
137	      "-F", "can_approve_pull_request_reviews=false"
138	    )
139	
140	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] applying branch protection on $defaultBranch"
141	    Invoke-GhApi -ApiArgs @(
142	      "-X", "PUT",
143	      "repos/$fullRepo/branches/$defaultBranch/protection"
144	    ) -InputJson $branchProtectionJson
145	
146	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
147	        repo = $fullRepo
148	        branch = $defaultBranch
149	        status = "ok"
150	        detail = "policies applied"
151	      })
152	  } catch {
153	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
154	        repo = $fullRepo
155	        branch = $defaultBranch
156	        status = "failed"
157	        detail = $_.Exception.Message
158	      })
159	  }
160	}
161	
162	Write-Host ""
163	Write-Host "Summary:"
164	$summary | Format-Table -AutoSize
165	
166	$failed = @($summary | Where-Object { $_.status -eq "failed" })
167	if ($failed.Count -gt 0) {
168	  throw "Completed with errors: $($failed.Count)"
169	}
170	
171	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Completed successfully."

41	function Get-RowValue {
42	  param(
43	    [pscustomobject]$Row,
44	    [string[]]$CandidateKeys
45	  )
46	
47	  foreach ($key in $CandidateKeys) {
48	    if ($Row.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $key) {
49	      $value = [string]$Row.$key
50	      if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($value)) {
51	        return $value.Trim()
52	      }
53	    }
54	  }
55	  return ""
56	}
57	
58	function Resolve-ManifestPath {
59	  param([string]$PathInput)
60	
61	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
62	    return $PathInput
63	  }
64	
65	  $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
66	  if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
67	    throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
68	  }
69	
70	  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
71	  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
72	    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
73	  }
74	  return $candidate.FullName
75	}
76	
77	function Invoke-Gh {
78	  param([string[]]$GhArgs)
79	
80	  & gh @GhArgs
81	  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
82	    throw "gh command failed: gh $($GhArgs -join ' ')"
83	  }
84	}
85	
86	$resolvedManifestPath = Resolve-ManifestPath -PathInput $ManifestPath
87	
88	if (-not (Test-Path $resolvedManifestPath -PathType Leaf)) {
89	  throw "Manifest not found: $resolvedManifestPath"
90	}
91	
92	$rows = Import-Csv -Path $resolvedManifestPath -Delimiter "`t"
93	if (-not $rows -or $rows.Count -eq 0) {
94	  throw "Manifest is empty: $resolvedManifestPath"
95	}
96	
97	$statusSet = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
98	foreach ($status in $Statuses) {
99	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($status)) {
100	    [void]$statusSet.Add($status.Trim())
101	  }
102	}
103	
104	$componentSet = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
105	foreach ($component in $Components) {
106	  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($component)) {
107	    [void]$componentSet.Add($component.Trim())
108	  }
109	}
110	
111	$filtered = @()
112	foreach ($row in $rows) {
113	  $component = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("component")
114	  $status = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("status")
115	
116	  if ($statusSet.Count -gt 0 -and -not $statusSet.Contains($status)) {
117	    continue
118	  }
119	  if ($componentSet.Count -gt 0 -and -not $componentSet.Contains($component)) {
120	    continue
121	  }
122	  $filtered += $row
123	}
124	$filtered = @($filtered)
125	
126	if ($Limit -gt 0 -and $filtered.Count -gt $Limit) {
127	  $filtered = @($filtered | Select-Object -First $Limit)
128	}
129	
130	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
131	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
132	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Rows selected: $($filtered.Count)"
133	
134	$summary = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
135	$seenRepos = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]([System.StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
136	
137	foreach ($row in $filtered) {
138	  $component = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("component")
139	  $repoUrl = Get-RowValue -Row $row -CandidateKeys @("repo")
140	  $repoName = Get-RepoNameFromUrl -Url $repoUrl
141	
142	  try {
143	    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoName)) {
144	      throw "cannot parse repo name from URL: $repoUrl"
145	    }
146	    if (-not $seenRepos.Add($repoName)) {
147	      continue
148	    }
149	
150	    $fullRepo = "$Org/$repoName"
151	    $repoJson = (& gh api "repos/$fullRepo")
152	    if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoJson)) {
153	      throw "cannot read repository metadata"
154	    }
155	
156	    $repoObj = $repoJson | ConvertFrom-Json
157	    $defaultBranch = [string]$repoObj.default_branch
158	    $parentFullName = ""
159	    if ($null -ne $repoObj.parent) {
160	      $parentFullName = [string]$repoObj.parent.full_name
161	    }
162	
163	    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($defaultBranch)) {
164	      throw "default branch is empty"
165	    }
166	    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($parentFullName)) {
167	      throw "repo is not a fork or parent cannot be resolved"
168	    }
169	
170	    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "[$fullRepo] parent=$parentFullName branch=$defaultBranch"
171	
172	    if ($DryRun) {
173	      $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
174	          component = $component
175	          repo = $fullRepo
176	          branch = $defaultBranch
177	          result = "dry_run"
178	        })
179	      continue
180	    }
181	
182	    $syncArgs = @("repo", "sync", $fullRepo, "-b", $defaultBranch)
183	    if ($Force) {
184	      $syncArgs += "--force"
185	    }
186	    Invoke-Gh -GhArgs $syncArgs
187	
188	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
189	        component = $component
190	        repo = $fullRepo
191	        branch = $defaultBranch
192	        result = "ok"
193	      })
194	  } catch {
195	    $summary.Add([pscustomobject]@{
196	        component = $component
197	        repo = "$Org/$repoName"
198	        branch = ""
199	        result = "error: $($_.Exception.Message)"
200	      })
201	  }
202	}
203	
204	Write-Host ""
205	Write-Host "Summary:"
206	$summary | Format-Table -AutoSize
207	
208	$errors = @($summary | Where-Object { $_.result -like "error:*" })
209	if ($errors.Count -gt 0) {
210	  throw "Completed with errors: $($errors.Count)"
211	}
212	
213	Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Completed successfully."

Tool Call #602 apply_patch call_hKbTY2u2KI4ybTdiqWOelxht 04:46:11
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1 @@ function Resolve-ManifestPath { param([string]$PathInput) if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInp...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1
@@
 function Resolve-ManifestPath {
   param([string]$PathInput)
 
   if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
     return $PathInput
   }
 
   $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
   if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
     throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
   }
 
-  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
-  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
-    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
+  $candidates = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
+  $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File
+  foreach ($file in $files) {
+    $header = (Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -TotalCount 1 -Encoding UTF8).Trim()
+    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($header)) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $hasComponent = $header -match "(^|`t)component(`t|$)"
+    $hasStatus = $header -match "(^|`t)status(`t|$)"
+    $hasRepo = $header -match "(^|`t)repo(`t|$)"
+    $hasCommit = $header -match "(^|`t)commit(`t|$)"
+    $hasTargetPath = $header -match "(^|`t)target_path(`t|$)"
+    $hasLocalPath = $header -match "(^|`t)local_path(`t|$)"
+    if (-not ($hasComponent -and $hasStatus -and $hasRepo -and $hasCommit -and ($hasTargetPath -or $hasLocalPath))) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $score = 0
+    if ($hasTargetPath) { $score += 100 }
+    if ($hasLocalPath) { $score += 10 }
+    if ($file.Name -ieq "manifest.tsv") { $score += 2 }
+
+    $candidates.Add([pscustomobject]@{
+        Path = $file.FullName
+        Score = $score
+      }) | Out-Null
+  }
+
+  if ($candidates.Count -eq 0) {
+    throw "No compatible manifest TSV found in $baseDir. Expected header with component/status/repo/commit and target_path or local_path."
+  }
+
+  $candidate = $candidates |
+    Sort-Object -Property @{ Expression = "Score"; Descending = $true }, @{ Expression = "Path"; Descending = $false } |
+    Select-Object -First 1
+
+  if ($candidates.Count -gt 1) {
+    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Multiple manifest candidates found. Selected: $($candidate.Path)"
   }
-  return $candidate.FullName
+
+  return $candidate.Path
 }
*** End Patch

 function Resolve-ManifestPath {
   param([string]$PathInput)
 
   if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($PathInput)) {
     return $PathInput
   }
 
   $baseDir = "docs/plan/plan0"
   if (-not (Test-Path $baseDir -PathType Container)) {
     throw "Manifest directory not found: $baseDir"
   }
 
-  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
-  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
-    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
+  $candidates = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
+  $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File
+  foreach ($file in $files) {
+    $header = (Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -TotalCount 1 -Encoding UTF8).Trim()
+    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($header)) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $hasComponent = $header -match "(^|`t)component(`t|$)"
+    $hasStatus = $header -match "(^|`t)status(`t|$)"
+    $hasRepo = $header -match "(^|`t)repo(`t|$)"
+    $hasCommit = $header -match "(^|`t)commit(`t|$)"
+    $hasTargetPath = $header -match "(^|`t)target_path(`t|$)"
+    $hasLocalPath = $header -match "(^|`t)local_path(`t|$)"
+    if (-not ($hasComponent -and $hasStatus -and $hasRepo -and $hasCommit -and ($hasTargetPath -or $hasLocalPath))) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $score = 0
+    if ($hasTargetPath) { $score += 100 }
+    if ($hasLocalPath) { $score += 10 }
+    if ($file.Name -ieq "manifest.tsv") { $score += 2 }
+
+    $candidates.Add([pscustomobject]@{
+        Path = $file.FullName
+        Score = $score
+      }) | Out-Null
+  }
+
+  if ($candidates.Count -eq 0) {
+    throw "No compatible manifest TSV found in $baseDir. Expected header with component/status/repo/commit and target_path or local_path."
+  }
+
+  $candidate = $candidates |
+    Sort-Object -Property @{ Expression = "Score"; Descending = $true }, @{ Expression = "Path"; Descending = $false } |
+    Select-Object -First 1
+
+  if ($candidates.Count -gt 1) {
+    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Multiple manifest candidates found. Selected: $($candidate.Path)"
   }
-  return $candidate.FullName
+
+  return $candidate.Path
 }
@@
 if ($Limit -gt 0 -and $filtered.Count -gt $Limit) {
   $filtered = @($filtered | Select-Object -First $Limit)
 }
+
+if ($filtered.Count -eq 0) {
+  throw "No rows selected. Check -Statuses/-Components/-Limit and manifest content."
+}
*** End Patch

-  $candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -First 1
-  if ($null -eq $candidate) {
-    throw "No TSV manifest found in $baseDir"
+  $candidates = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[object]
+  $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $baseDir -Filter "*.tsv" -File
+  foreach ($file in $files) {
+    $header = (Get-Content -Path $file.FullName -TotalCount 1 -Encoding UTF8).Trim()
+    if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($header)) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $hasComponent = $header -match "(^|`t)component(`t|$)"
+    $hasStatus = $header -match "(^|`t)status(`t|$)"
+    $hasRepo = $header -match "(^|`t)repo(`t|$)"
+    $hasCommit = $header -match "(^|`t)commit(`t|$)"
+    $hasTargetPath = $header -match "(^|`t)target_path(`t|$)"
+    $hasLocalPath = $header -match "(^|`t)local_path(`t|$)"
+    if (-not ($hasComponent -and $hasStatus -and $hasRepo -and $hasCommit -and ($hasTargetPath -or $hasLocalPath))) {
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $score = 0
+    if ($hasTargetPath) { $score += 100 }
+    if ($hasLocalPath) { $score += 10 }
+    if ($file.Name -ieq "manifest.tsv") { $score += 2 }
+
+    $candidates.Add([pscustomobject]@{
+        Path = $file.FullName
+        Score = $score
+      }) | Out-Null
   }
-  return $candidate.FullName
+
+  if ($candidates.Count -eq 0) {
+    throw "No compatible manifest TSV found in $baseDir. Expected header with component/status/repo/commit and target_path or local_path."
+  }
+
+  $candidate = $candidates |
+    Sort-Object -Property @{ Expression = "Score"; Descending = $true }, @{ Expression = "Path"; Descending = $false } |
+    Select-Object -First 1
+
+  if ($candidates.Count -gt 1) {
+    Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Multiple manifest candidates found. Selected: $($candidate.Path)"
+  }
+
+  return $candidate.Path
 }
 
 function Invoke-Gh {
@@ -127,6 +164,10 @@ if ($Limit -gt 0 -and $filtered.Count -gt $Limit) {
   $filtered = @($filtered | Select-Object -First $Limit)
 }
 
+if ($filtered.Count -eq 0) {
+  throw "No rows selected. Check -Statuses/-Components/-Limit and manifest content."
+}
+
 Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Org: $Org"
 Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Manifest: $resolvedManifestPath"
 Write-Log -Level "INFO" -Message "Rows selected: $($filtered.Count)"

assistant #640 final_answer 04:47:51

已按计划继续并完成，且已推送到组织仓库。

完成内容：
1. 修复 manifest 自动发现过宽问题
- 现在会校验 TSV 表头必须包含 component/status/repo/commit 且有 target_path 或 local_path，再按得分选候选，避免误选。
- 修改文件：[apply-org-policies.ps1](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/apply-org-policies.ps1)
- 修改文件：[sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1)

2. 修复“0 行空跑仍成功”问题
- sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1 在过滤后 0 行会直接 throw 失败。
- 修改文件：[sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1](d:/demo1/papaweb/scripts/plan0/sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1)

验证结果：
- apply-org-policies.ps1 -DryRun：通过
- sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1 -DryRun：通过
- sync-forks-from-upstream.ps1 -Statuses nonexistent-status：按预期失败（不再假成功）

已提交并推送：
- commit: 7e1fc5a
- remote: git@github.com:papaweb-org/papaweb.git
- branch: main

assistant #649 final_answer 04:48:48

截至今天（2026-03-13），你们项目状态是：

1. 资产归属
- 主仓已在组织：papaweb-org/papaweb
- 本地远端也已切到组织仓

2. 上游仓管理
- 清单里的 21 个上游仓都在 papaweb-org 下
- 清单 repo 列已统一改为组织地址

3. 自动化能力
- 已有两个可用脚本：
- 批量设置策略（actions/workflow/branch protection）
- 批量同步 fork 与 upstream
- 脚本已做加固：manifest 识别更严格、空跑会报错

4. 策略落地
- 21 个 fork 仓：策略已生效
- 主仓：Actions 权限已收紧（local_only + token read）
- 主仓分支保护：受 GitHub 套餐限制（私有仓）暂未开启

下一步建议（先讨论，不改）：

1. 先定治理策略
- 是否升级 GitHub 套餐以开启主仓分支保护（这是最关键决策）

2. 再定“二开发布链路”
- 二开代码在各 fork 开发
- 主仓只收版本引用（tag/commit/image），不收整份 upstream 代码

3. 建立固定节奏
- 每周/每月同步 upstream（脚本化）
- 冲突处理规则、回滚规则、负责人明确

4. 补文档规范
- 一页《开发与发布流程》：谁改哪里、何时同步、如何发布、如何回滚

你现在整体方向是对的，核心待决策点只剩一个：主仓分支保护怎么落地（套餐/仓库可见性）。

assistant #670 final_answer 04:56:33

可以，结论先说：

截至 2026-03-13，你们这种“组织下私有仓库”要落地主仓分支保护，核心有 3 条路：

1. 保持私有 + 升级组织到 Team（推荐）
- 能用 branch protection / rulesets（私有仓可用）。
- 成本是按人头付费，但安全和治理最完整。
- 依据：GitHub Docs 说明私有仓分支保护需 Pro/Team/Enterprise。
- https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-protected-branches
- https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-rulesets

2. 改为公开仓库 + Free
- Free 也能用分支保护/规则（公开仓可用）。
- 代价是源码公开，不适合你们当前商业化二开场景。
- 同上文档说明（public + Free 可用）。

3. 保持私有 + 不升级（临时兜底）
- 不能真正启用分支保护（你们之前 API 403 就是这个原因）。
- 只能靠流程约束（减少写权限、人工审批、CI 约定），技术强制力最弱。

我建议你们选 方案 1。
因为你们已经在做组织化治理和多仓协作，后面持续二开时，规则强制比“口头流程”稳定很多。

补充：GitHub Pricing 当前 Team 页面也写了 Repository rules（可作采购依据）
- https://github.com/pricing

可以，结论先说：

截至 2026-03-13，你们这种“组织下私有仓库”要落地主仓分支保护，核心有 3 条路：

1. 保持私有 + 升级组织到 Team（推荐）
- 能用 branch protection / rulesets（私有仓可用）。
- 成本是按人头付费，但安全和治理最完整。
- 依据：GitHub Docs 说明私有仓分支保护需 Pro/Team/Enterprise。
- https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-protected-branches
- https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-rulesets

2. 改为公开仓库 + Free
- Free 也能用分支保护/规则（公开仓可用）。
- 代价是源码公开，不适合你们当前商业化二开场景。
- 同上文档说明（public + Free 可用）。

3. 保持私有 + 不升级（临时兜底）
- 不能真正启用分支保护（你们之前 API 403 就是这个原因）。
- 只能靠流程约束（减少写权限、人工审批、CI 约定），技术强制力最弱。

我建议你们选 方案 1。
因为你们已经在做组织化治理和多仓协作，后面持续二开时，规则强制比“口头流程”稳定很多。

Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }

你说的三点 我都不明白 可以通俗的解读一下吗

token_count #676 05:04:40
total_tokens=6062530
total 6062530in 6008915out 53615reason 27265
assistant #677 final_answer 05:04:46

通俗版：

你现在想要的是“谁都不能随便改主分支（main）”。
这个功能叫“分支保护”，但 GitHub 不是所有套餐都给私有仓用。

你有 3 种选择：

1. 保密不公开 + 花钱升级（推荐）
- 仓库继续私有
- 付费后就能开启“必须 PR、必须审核、禁止直接推 main”
- 适合你现在这种商业项目

2. 不花钱 + 把仓库公开
- 公开后免费也能用分支保护
- 但代码所有人都看得到
- 对你们不合适（你们是私有项目）

3. 不花钱 + 继续私有
- 不能开真正的分支保护
- 只能靠“大家自觉别直接推 main”
- 风险大，容易误操作

一句话：
你们现在最稳的是 第1种：私有 + 升级组织套餐。
这样才能“技术上强制”团队走规范流程，不靠自觉。

通俗版：

你现在想要的是“谁都不能随便改主分支（main）”。
这个功能叫“分支保护”，但 GitHub 不是所有套餐都给私有仓用。

你有 3 种选择：

1. 保密不公开 + 花钱升级（推荐）
- 仓库继续私有
- 付费后就能开启“必须 PR、必须审核、禁止直接推 main”
- 适合你现在这种商业项目

2. 不花钱 + 把仓库公开
- 公开后免费也能用分支保护
- 但代码所有人都看得到
- 对你们不合适（你们是私有项目）

3. 不花钱 + 继续私有
- 不能开真正的分支保护
- 只能靠“大家自觉别直接推 main”
- 风险大，容易误操作

一句话：
你们现在最稳的是 第1种：私有 + 升级组织套餐。
这样才能“技术上强制”团队走规范流程，不靠自觉。

assistant #686 final_answer 05:06:36

可以，这条路能走，但要先讲清楚一件事：

AGENTS.md 只是“团队约定说明书”，不是 GitHub 的“硬门禁”。
它能规范行为，不能像分支保护那样从平台层面强制拦截。

不花钱可用的最稳方案是：

1. 权限最小化
- 主仓 main 只保留 1-2 个维护者有写权限
- 其他人只给 Read/Triage，通过 PR 协作

2. 本地规则文件
- 用 AGENTS.md 写死流程：禁止直推 main、必须走 feature/*、必须 PR、必须通过检查

3. 本地 Git Hook（关键）
- pre-push 拦截推送到 main（本地强制）
- 这比只写文档更有效

4. CI 只做检查不做强制合并
- PR 上跑测试/lint
- 维护者人工确认后再合并

一句话：
AGENTS.md 可以当“制度”，pre-push hook + 最小权限 当“低成本门禁”。
但只要有人有写权限，仍然可以绕过本地规则直推，所以强度不如 GitHub 分支保护。

如果你同意，我下一步只给你一版“零成本治理规则草案”（文本方案，不改代码）。

token_count #687 05:06:36
total_tokens=6263979
total 6263979in 6208865out 55114reason 28192
user #688 05:06:36

来约束可以吗 大部分都是我们本地团队开发

token_count #689 05:06:39
total_tokens=6263979
total 6263979in 6208865out 55114reason 28192
assistant #690 final_answer 05:06:44

可以，完全可以约束，而且对“本地团队开发”为主的场景很实用。

结论：
- AGENTS.md + Git Hook + 权限最小化 能把风险降很多。
- 不是 100% 技术强制，但日常协作足够有效。

最小落地组合（不花钱）：
1. AGENTS.md 写清规则（禁止直推 main、必须 PR、必须测试通过）
2. 所有人安装 pre-push hook（拦截推 main）
3. 主仓只保留极少数人有写权限
4. PR 必须过 CI 后再合并（人工把关）

对你们这种“自己团队开发、人数可控”的情况，这套方案是可行的。
你要的话，我下一步可以给你一份“可直接贴进 AGENTS.md 的规则文本”（先给文本，不改文件）。

可以，完全可以约束，而且对“本地团队开发”为主的场景很实用。

结论：
- AGENTS.md + Git Hook + 权限最小化 能把风险降很多。
- 不是 100% 技术强制，但日常协作足够有效。

最小落地组合（不花钱）：
1. AGENTS.md 写清规则（禁止直推 main、必须 PR、必须测试通过）
2. 所有人安装 pre-push hook（拦截推 main）
3. 主仓只保留极少数人有写权限
4. PR 必须过 CI 后再合并（人工把关）

对你们这种“自己团队开发、人数可控”的情况，这套方案是可行的。

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: AGENTS.md +# AGENTS.md + +## 1) 目标 +本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。 + +## 2) 分支模型 +- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。 +- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: AGENTS.md
+# AGENTS.md
+
+## 1) 目标
+本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。
+
+## 2) 分支模型
+- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。
+- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。
+- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
+- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
+- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。
+
+## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）
+- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。
+- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。
+- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。
+- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。
+- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。
+
+## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则
+- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：
+- `CI` 通过（单元测试、静态检查）。
+- `E2E` 通过（端到端关键路径）。
+- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。
+- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。
+
+## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则
+- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：
+- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。
+- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。
+- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。
+- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。
+- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：
+- 1 个单元测试。
+- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。
+- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。
+
+## 6) PR 必填信息
+- 变更目的与范围。
+- 验收标准（可观察结果）。
+- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。
+- 风险点与回滚方案。
+- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。
+
+## 7) 合并策略
+- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。
+- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。
+
+## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）
+- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。
+- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。
+
+## 9) 紧急例外流程
+- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。
+- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。
+- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。
*** End Patch

Output:
# AGENTS.md

## 1) 目标
本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。

## 2) 分支模型
- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。
- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。
- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。

## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）
- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。
- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。
- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。
- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。
- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。

## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则
- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：
- `CI` 通过（单元测试、静态检查）。
- `E2E` 通过（端到端关键路径）。
- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。
- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。

## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则
- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：
- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。
- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。
- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。
- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。
- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：
- 1 个单元测试。
- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。
- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。

## 6) PR 必填信息
- 变更目的与范围。
- 验收标准（可观察结果）。
- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。
- 风险点与回滚方案。
- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。

## 7) 合并策略
- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。
- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。

## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）
- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。
- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。

## 9) 紧急例外流程
- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。
- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。
- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。

19:## 9) 绱ф€ヤ緥澶栨祦绋?- 浠?`hotfix/*` 鍙蛋绱ф€ユ祦绋嬨€?- 闇€鍦?PR 鎻忚堪涓啓鏄庡師鍥犮€侀闄┿€佸洖婊氭楠ゃ€?- 绱ф€ヤ慨澶嶅悎鍏?`main` 鍚庯紝蹇呴』鍦?24 灏忔椂鍐呭洖鍚堝埌 `dev` 骞惰ˉ榻愭祴璇曘€?

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: 1:# AGENTS.md 2: 3:## 1) 目标 4:本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。 5: 6:## 2) 分支模型 7:- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。 8:- `dev`：日常...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
1:# AGENTS.md
2:
3:## 1) 目标
4:本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。
5:
6:## 2) 分支模型
7:- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。
8:- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。
9:- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
10:- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
11:- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。
12:
13:## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）
14:- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。
15:- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。
16:- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。
17:- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。
18:- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。
19:
20:## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则
21:- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：
22:- `CI` 通过（单元测试、静态检查）。
23:- `E2E` 通过（端到端关键路径）。
24:- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。
25:- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。
26:
27:## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则
28:- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：
29:- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。
30:- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。
31:- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。
32:- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。
33:- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：
34:- 1 个单元测试。
35:- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。
36:- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。
37:
38:## 6) PR 必填信息
39:- 变更目的与范围。
40:- 验收标准（可观察结果）。
41:- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。
42:- 风险点与回滚方案。
43:- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。
44:
45:## 7) 合并策略
46:- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。
47:- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。
48:
49:## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）
50:- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。
51:- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。
52:
53:## 9) 紧急例外流程
54:- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。
55:- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。
56:- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: AGENTS.md @@ ## 2) 分支模型 - `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。 - `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。 - `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。 - `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `d...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: AGENTS.md
@@
 ## 2) 分支模型
 - `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。
 - `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。
 - `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
 - `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。
+- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。
 - `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。
@@
 ## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则
 - PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：
-- `CI` 通过（单元测试、静态检查）。
-- `E2E` 通过（端到端关键路径）。
+- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。
+- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。
 - 任一检查失败，禁止合并。
 - 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。
*** End Patch

Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

assistant #809 final_answer 05:24:07

下一步建议按这个顺序做：

1. 建立并启用 dev 流程
- 创建远端 dev 分支。
- 团队约定所有功能分支从 dev 切，PR 只先合到 dev。

2. 补齐流水线（现在最关键）
- 把现有 ci.yml 的触发从 main 扩到 dev 的 pull_request。
- 新增 e2e.yml，产出一个叫 e2e 的检查（和 AGENTS.md 对齐）。

3. 落地“本地强约束”
- 发放 pre-push hook：禁止直接 push 到 main/dev。
- 写一条团队安装命令，确保每个人都启用。

4. 配套 PR 模板
- 强制填写：变更范围、测试证据、风险与回滚。
- 和 AGENTS.md 的 TDD 要求对齐。

5. 做一次演练
- 走一条完整链路：feature/* -> PR -> dev -> CI+E2E -> merge，验证规则可执行。

如果你同意，我下一步就从第 1、2 步开始落地。

下一步建议按这个顺序做：

1. 建立并启用 dev 流程
- 创建远端 dev 分支。
- 团队约定所有功能分支从 dev 切，PR 只先合到 dev。

2. 补齐流水线（现在最关键）
- 把现有 ci.yml 的触发从 main 扩到 dev 的 pull_request。
- 新增 e2e.yml，产出一个叫 e2e 的检查（和 AGENTS.md 对齐）。

3. 落地“本地强约束”
- 发放 pre-push hook：禁止直接 push 到 main/dev。
- 写一条团队安装命令，确保每个人都启用。

4. 配套 PR 模板
- 强制填写：变更范围、测试证据、风险与回滚。
- 和 AGENTS.md 的 TDD 要求对齐。

5. 做一次演练
- 走一条完整链路：feature/* -> PR -> dev -> CI+E2E -> merge，验证规则可执行。

如果你同意，我下一步就从第 1、2 步开始落地。

Tool Call #851 apply_patch call_sI2Fq83eueb8rT5H8mDHIuke 05:26:45
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: docs/执行待办清单.md +# 执行待办清单（dev 分支治理与测试驱动落地） + +创建日期：2026-03-13 +负责人：papaweb 团队 + +## 目标 +- 建立 `dev` 分支协作流，禁止日常变更直达 `main`。 +- PR 必须通过 `ci` 与 `e2e` 检查...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: docs/执行待办清单.md
+# 执行待办清单（dev 分支治理与测试驱动落地）
+
+创建日期：2026-03-13  
+负责人：papaweb 团队
+
+## 目标
+- 建立 `dev` 分支协作流，禁止日常变更直达 `main`。
+- PR 必须通过 `ci` 与 `e2e` 检查后才能合并到 `dev`。
+- 落地 TDD 协作方式，并进行一次流程演练。
+
+## 待办项（按顺序执行）
+- [ ] 1. 建立并启用 `dev` 流程
+  - [ ] 创建远端 `dev` 分支
+  - [ ] 约定 `feature/*`、`fix/*` 分支从 `dev` 切出并回合 `dev`
+- [ ] 2. 补齐流水线（CI + E2E）
+  - [ ] `ci` 在 `pull_request -> dev` 生效
+  - [ ] 新增 `e2e` workflow，产出 `e2e` 检查
+- [ ] 3. 落地本地防护
+  - [ ] 提供 `pre-push` hook（拦截直推 `main` / `dev`）
+  - [ ] 提供 hook 安装方式与团队执行说明
+- [ ] 4. 配置 PR 模板
+  - [ ] PR 模板包含：目的、验收标准、测试证据、风险与回滚
+  - [ ] 与 `AGENTS.md` 的 TDD 规则一致
+- [ ] 5. 演练一次完整链路
+  - [ ] 跑通 `feature/* -> PR -> dev -> ci/e2e -> merge`
+  - [ ] 记录演练结果与发现问题
+
+## Review 记录
+- [ ] Review 第 1 轮：通过 / 不通过（待填写）
+- [ ] Review 第 2 轮：通过 / 不通过（待填写）
+
+## 完成标准
+- 上述 1~5 全部打勾。
+- 关键文件已提交并推送到 `papaweb-org/papaweb`。
*** End Patch

import crypto from "node:crypto";
import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import http from "node:http";
import https from "node:https";
import path from "node:path";
import process from "node:process";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const CRAWLER_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..");
const RAW_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "raw");
const STATE_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "state");

const DEFAULTS = {
  config: path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "config", "source-sites.v1.json"),
  timeoutMs: 20000,
  retries: 2,
  intervalMinutes: 120,
  revisitHours: 72,
  pinchtabUrl: process.env.PINCHTAB_URL || "",
  pinchtabMode: "fallback",
  pinchtabTimeoutMs: 45000,
  pinchtabWaitMs: 1200,
  pinchtabStatuses: [403, 429, 503],
  pinchtabToken: process.env.PINCHTAB_TOKEN || "",
  delayMinMs: null,
  delayMaxMs: null,
  maxFailures: null,
  maxConsecutiveFailures: null,
};

function nodeFetch(url, options = {}, redirectCount = 0) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    let target;
    try {
      target = new URL(url);
    } catch (err) {
      reject(err);
      return;
    }
    const lib = target.protocol === "https:" ? https : http;
    const reqOptions = {
      method: options.method ?? "GET",
      headers: options.headers ?? {},
    };

    const req = lib.request(target, reqOptions, (res) => {
      const status = Number(res.statusCode ?? 0);
      const location = res.headers.location;
      const shouldFollowRedirect =
        options.redirect === "follow" &&
        Boolean(location) &&
        [301, 302, 303, 307, 308].includes(status) &&
        redirectCount < 8;

      if (shouldFollowRedirect) {
        res.resume();
        const nextUrl = new URL(String(location), target).toString();
        const nextMethod = status === 303 ? "GET" : reqOptions.method;
        const nextOptions = {
          ...options,
          method: nextMethod,
        };
        if (status === 303) {
          delete nextOptions.body;
        }
        nodeFetch(nextUrl, nextOptions, redirectCount + 1).then(resolve).catch(reject);
        return;
      }

      const chunks = [];
      res.on("data", (chunk) => chunks.push(Buffer.from(chunk)));
      res.on("error", reject);
      res.on("end", () => {
        const body = Buffer.concat(chunks);
        const headersObj = {
          get(name) {
            const value = res.headers[String(name).toLowerCase()];
            if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.join(", ");
            if (value === undefined || value === null) return null;
            return String(value);
          },
          getSetCookie() {
            const value = res.headers["set-cookie"];
            if (!value) return [];
            return Array.isArray(value) ? value.map((v) => String(v)) : [String(value)];
          },
        };
        resolve({
          ok: status >= 200 && status < 300,
          status,
          url: target.toString(),
          headers: headersObj,
          arrayBuffer: async () =>
            body.buffer.slice(body.byteOffset, body.byteOffset + body.byteLength),
          text: async () => body.toString("utf8"),
        });
      });
    });

    req.on("error", reject);

    const abortHandler = () => {
      req.destroy(new Error("This operation was aborted"));
    };
    if (options.signal) {
      if (options.signal.aborted) {
        abortHandler();
        return;
      }
      options.signal.addEventListener("abort", abortHandler, { once: true });
    }

    if (options.body !== undefined && options.body !== null) {
      req.write(options.body);
    }
    req.end();
  });
}

const fetchCompat = typeof globalThis.fetch === "function" ? globalThis.fetch.bind(globalThis) : nodeFetch;

let shouldStop = false;
process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  shouldStop = true;
  console.log("\\nReceived interrupt signal. Will exit after current source finishes.");
});

function parseArgs(argv) {
  const args = {
    once: false,
    loop: false,
    sourceIds: null,
    maxUrlsPerSource: null,
    intervalMinutes: DEFAULTS.intervalMinutes,
    timeoutMs: DEFAULTS.timeoutMs,
    retries: DEFAULTS.retries,
    revisitHours: DEFAULTS.revisitHours,
    config: DEFAULTS.config,
    pinchtabUrl: DEFAULTS.pinchtabUrl,
    pinchtabMode: DEFAULTS.pinchtabMode,
    pinchtabTimeoutMs: DEFAULTS.pinchtabTimeoutMs,
    pinchtabWaitMs: DEFAULTS.pinchtabWaitMs,
    pinchtabStatuses: DEFAULTS.pinchtabStatuses,
    pinchtabToken: DEFAULTS.pinchtabToken,
    delayMinMs: DEFAULTS.delayMinMs,
    delayMaxMs: DEFAULTS.delayMaxMs,
    maxFailures: DEFAULTS.maxFailures,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: DEFAULTS.maxConsecutiveFailures,
    sourceConcurrency: 1,
  };

  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    const token = argv[i];
    const next = argv[i + 1];
    if (token === "--once") args.once = true;
    if (token === "--loop") args.loop = true;
    if (token === "--source" && next) {
      args.sourceIds = next.split(",").map((v) => v.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--max-urls-per-source" && next) {
      args.maxUrlsPerSource = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--interval-minutes" && next) {
      args.intervalMinutes = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--timeout-ms" && next) {
      args.timeoutMs = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--retries" && next) {
      args.retries = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--revisit-hours" && next) {
      args.revisitHours = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--config" && next) {
      args.config = path.resolve(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-url" && next) {
      args.pinchtabUrl = next.trim();
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-mode" && next) {
      args.pinchtabMode = next.trim().toLowerCase();
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-timeout-ms" && next) {
      args.pinchtabTimeoutMs = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-wait-ms" && next) {
      args.pinchtabWaitMs = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-statuses" && next) {
      args.pinchtabStatuses = next
        .split(",")
        .map((v) => Number(v.trim()))
        .filter((v) => Number.isInteger(v) && v > 0);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-token" && next) {
      args.pinchtabToken = next.trim();
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--delay-min-ms" && next) {
      args.delayMinMs = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--delay-max-ms" && next) {
      args.delayMaxMs = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--max-failures" && next) {
      args.maxFailures = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--max-consecutive-failures" && next) {
      args.maxConsecutiveFailures = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--source-concurrency" && next) {
      args.sourceConcurrency = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
    if (token === "--disable-pinchtab") {
      args.pinchtabUrl = "";
      args.pinchtabMode = "disable";
    }
  }

  if (!args.once && !args.loop) {
    args.once = true;
  }
  if (!["fallback", "always", "disable"].includes(args.pinchtabMode)) {
    args.pinchtabMode = "fallback";
  }
  if (!Number.isFinite(args.sourceConcurrency) || args.sourceConcurrency < 1) {
    args.sourceConcurrency = 1;
  }
  return args;
}

function nowIso() {
  return new Date().toISOString();
}

function runIdFromDate(date = new Date()) {
  return date.toISOString().replaceAll(":", "-").replaceAll(".", "-");
}

function sha1(input) {
Tool Result #909 shell_command call_x5PehxmRYTL6BagfobLlgyrE exit 0 05:28:12
